narrative.description: Polyphony Digital's PS1 racing sim pioneered the license-driven career mode with hundreds of real cars, tuning depth, and rigorous driving tests gating progression through class championships.
narrative.core_loop: Pass license tests, earn credits in races, buy and tune cars, and win championships to unlock higher license tiers and events.

mechanics.map_notes: B-A-IB-IA-S license tests gate access to car classes and events.
mechanics.expression: B-A-IB-IA-S license tests gate access to car classes and events.

mechanics.map_notes: Credits buy cars and parts; tuning affects race performance.
mechanics.expression: Credits buy cars and parts; tuning affects race performance.

mechanics.map_notes: Race events, championships, and tests selectable from world map menus.
mechanics.expression: Race events, championships, and tests selectable from world map menus.

mechanics.map_notes: Parts shop upgrades suspension, gearing, and power.
mechanics.expression: Parts shop upgrades suspension, gearing, and power.

mechanics.map_notes: Prize money from races funds garage expansion.
mechanics.expression: Prize money from races funds garage expansion.

mechanics.map_notes: License tests demand pixel-perfect racing lines akin to platform precision.
mechanics.expression: License tests demand pixel-perfect racing lines akin to platform precision.

mechanics.map_notes: Failed license tests retry immediately with penalty-free learning.
mechanics.expression: Failed license tests retry immediately with penalty-free learning.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Gran Turismo through its core racing loop.
